scripts.verify: pnpm type-check && NEXT_OUTPUT_MODE=standalone pnpm build && python3 -m py_compile apps/worker-py/main.py apps/worker-py/scheduler.py apps/worker-py/queue_runtime.py && node scripts/check-standalone-runtime-init.mjs && pnpm --filter @huoziwriter/web exec node ../../scripts/check-postgres-runtime-init.mjs
scripts.verify:ui: pnpm test-storybook && pnpm build-storybook && pnpm test:ui:a11y
scripts.test:e2e: rm -rf apps/web/.next apps/web/.next-e2e && pnpm build && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: rm -rf apps/web/.next apps/web/.next-e2e && pnpm build && playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts
